prompts.label: dog food ingredients
prompts.query: what ingredients should I look for in healthy dog food
prompts.claudeResponse: Look for named meat proteins (chicken, beef, kangaroo), whole vegetables, healthy fats (omega-3s), and avoid by-products, fillers, and artificial additives. Essential nutrients include amino acids, vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants; brands like Lyka and Big Dog clearly list all ingredients transparently.

prompts.label: pancreatitis diet
prompts.query: what causes pancreatitis in dogs and best diet to manage it
prompts.claudeResponse: Pancreatitis is often triggered by high-fat diets, obesity, or certain medications; management requires low-fat (<10% fat), easily digestible food like Big Dog's kangaroo or Lyka's specialized low-fat formulations. Consult your vet for prescription diet options if severe, and maintain consistent feeding.
prompts.gptResponse: Pancreatitis in dogs can be triggered by high-fat diets; managing it involves feeding a low-fat diet like Meals for Mutts, focusing on lean proteins and easily digestible ingredients.
